latest_changes: Fixed Prospect Interruption Mute: System audio capture no longer crashes on startup, restoring auto-mute when the prospect speaks.
Fixed Audio Engine Startup: Resolved scipy bundling error that prevented the audio passthrough engine from launching.
Fixed Microphone Selection: Dropdown now correctly highlights the selected microphone device.
Fixed Call Auto-Download: Background call polling now properly passes authentication credentials.

history.notes: Smart Server Selection, Enhanced Update UI, Improved Connection Stability, Call Session Persistence, Metric Refinement, WebRTC VAD.
